case_title: FIONA MCLAUGHLIN VS. ELEVATION SALON & CAFE, INC., A BUSINESS ENTITY et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-03-2004 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

WRONGFUL DISCHARGE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCLAUGHLIN, FIONA AS TO DEFENDANT ELEVATION SALON & CAFE, INC., A BUSINESS ENTITY RASMUSSEN, HENRIK DOES 1-XX SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-17-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-14-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-02-2004
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-01-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR AUG-03-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST JOHN F. HENNING, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: AUG-03-2004 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-18-2004. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LETICIA PEREZ. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-01-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-17-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AND ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION
